## Testing

How was this verified? List the commands you ran (`make test`, `pnpm -r test`, etc.)
and any manual checks.

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint and format pass (`ruff`); TypeScript typechecks (`pnpm -r typecheck`).
- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`, `pnpm -r test`).
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests; bug fixes add a `regression` test.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, configuration, or APIs changed.
- [ ] No layering violations (see [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md)).
